KATHMANDU, Nov 8: Nepal women's national football team will play their first match against India on Thursday in Olympic Asian Qualifiers on Thursday.

The Nepali team was in China for warm-up and match practice. The Nepali side has already played with local Chines football club to prepare for the Thursday's game.

The Nepali team had travelled to Myanmar from China.

Nepal will play agaisnt Myanmar on November 11 and on November 13 against Bangladesh.
